results.title: Gov. Mills says she never dropped out of Senate race and is still on primary ballot
results.description: Mills told the Sun Journal over the weekend that while she suspended her campaign, she never actually withdrew or dropped out.

results.title: Photographer recounts unprovoked stabbing at Maine wedding
results.description: “I looked down, and I saw a hole in my stomach. And I said, ‘That’s not very good.’"

results.title: UC Faculty Blames Test-Free Admissions for Math Gaps
results.description: More than 1,100 University of California math and science professors said declining student preparedness is forcing instructors to teach middle-school math in college classrooms, prompting a call to restore SAT and ACT requirements across the UC system.
